block.ulterlands.bore_engine.description: §bBreaks and ejects the blocks under it §8until bedrock/obsidian (when §4powered§8)
Vertical Teleportation Effect varies with Circuit Power
block.ulterlands.starry_specklum.descrip: §8Right-click with a pickaxe in hand to extract ore
death.attack.bleed_damage.player: %1$s bled out whilst trying to escape %2$s
death.attack.ether.player: %1$s returned to stone whilst fleeing from %2$s

item.ulterlands.argentum_rod.description: §8A refined, sturdy rod forged for weaponry.
item.ulterlands.bewitched_blade.descript: A charm in the shape of a sword; dark as night.
item.ulterlands.black_pearl.description_: §8A dark pearl that seems to glimmer with power.
item.ulterlands.blast_powder.description: §8A dim, black powder with middling explosive capabilities.
item.ulterlands.blast_spores.description: §8A toxic clump of murky green spores that can set off chemical reactions.
item.ulterlands.celestial_tear.descripti: §8A crystallised tear that throbs with unknowable power.
item.ulterlands.conductors_baton.descrip: §8Swing while mounting a Palemarcher to command them to attack.
item.ulterlands.cone_organ.description_0: §8Indigo, horn-shaped organ from a Bazzernaut's organic subwoofers.
item.ulterlands.consortium.description_0: §8A glimmering ore capable of taking many forms.
item.ulterlands.consortium_nugget.descri: §8A glimmering ore capable of taking many forms.
item.ulterlands.cooked_marpork.descripti: §8A nicely seared, nutritious piece of pork.
item.ulterlands.cosmic_glass.description: §8A warped piece of specklum glass that shines with the light of the stars.
item.ulterlands.elegy.description_1: When faced with a target, perform a quick dash backwards to create distance
item.ulterlands.ether_cage_blast.descrip: Cast forth a ball of devilish crimson fire at foes
§8    Deals 3 Damage in area upon landing
item.ulterlands.ether_cage_chains.descri: Cast forth a ball of dark light that homes in on foes
item.ulterlands.ether_cage_heal.descript: Cast forth a ball of light that faintly homes in on foes
§8    Restores 2HP to you when hitting targets
item.ulterlands.ether_cage_pierce.descri: Cast forth a sharp, dark curtain of ether magic at foes
item.ulterlands.ether_cage_shield.descri: Cast forth an emerald spark that erects a might shield
§8    Spawns Aethershield (between you and a foe or on the ground)
item.ulterlands.ether_cage_storm.descrip: Cast forth a gust of writhing winds at foes
§8    Traps hit targets in erratic winds
item.ulterlands.ether_cage_trap.descript: Cast forth a cosmic effigy of fear at foes
item.ulterlands.false_cedar.description_: §8A chunk of organic material that resembles wood but is closer to steel.
item.ulterlands.funeral_edge.description: Creates a domain; pulling all mobs in it towards you and weakening their ATK.
item.ulterlands.fungal_marpork.descripti: §8An uncooked piece of pork; infested with fungi
item.ulterlands.gale_ring.description_0: A finely crafted ring with a straight rune down the middle.
item.ulterlands.gale_ring.description_2: §8    Perform a quick dash in the direction you're looking
item.ulterlands.gale_ring.description_3: §8    Gain Resistance V during the dash
item.ulterlands.limit_breaker.descriptio: A delicate syringe filled with odd fluid.
§8    Transforms you into a cloud; granting flight
item.ulterlands.little_elderbone.descrip: §8A small femur from those of an ancient cizilisation.
item.ulterlands.mourning_gale.descriptio: Sends forth a wave of sparks followed by paralyzing lightning bolts
item.ulterlands.necrotic_jewel.descripti: §8A sickly yellow gem that throbs with the power of countless souls.
item.ulterlands.obscura_mantle.descripti: A glossy, black cloak that hums with power
item.ulterlands.opaline_ward.description: Raise the shield and invoke its power; reflecting all incoming damage to attackers.
§2  3 sec Max Usage Time §8| §210 sec Cooldown §8(reduces if released early)
item.ulterlands.protean_wand.description: Cast forth an amorphous blob of raw ether magic at foes
Channel ether magic to restore the durability of your wand
item.ulterlands.pyro_plate.description_0: §8A shimmering golden slab that remains hot to the touch.
item.ulterlands.razorbone.description_0: §8A sharp, uneven bone made for rending flesh - one of many.
item.ulterlands.reveal_glass.description: A clear piece of glass warped in the shape of an eye.
§8    Reveals all entities in the vicinity; breaking Invisibility as well
item.ulterlands.shifting_scales.descript: §8Dark violet scales that seem to fade in and out of sight.
item.ulterlands.stabilizer.description_0: A delicate syringe filled with odd fluid.
item.ulterlands.stimulant.description_0: A delicate syringe filled with odd fluid.
item.ulterlands.vocra_rations.descriptio: §8A strip of nutritious pale flesh; slightly tinted gold.
item.ulterlands.white_flesh.description_: §8A strip of nutritious pale flesh; slightly tinted gold.
